## Fake Content is Impacting the Bottom Line

![shapes](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20539%20350'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Years of effort can be ruined in seconds. Whether it’s marketplaces, job listings, or online dating, fake listings can be emotionally and financially damaging. Safeguard your brand from being associated with these negative experiences by proactively preventing fraudulent listings.

68%

Increase in the frequency of spam and scams*

*Source: Sift research and analysis

79%

Of consumers say user-generated content impacts their purchasing decisions*

*Source: Stackla Survey

## Fortify Your Online Platform Against Spam and Scams

**Catch fraudulent users and content**. Leverage AI to assess the fraud risk of both the content and content creator.

**Ensure a seamless experience for trusted users**. Create dynamic customer journeys with AI-based decisioning coupled with rules.

**Illuminate unknown threats**. Shine a light on hidden and emerging risk before harmful content can be created.

**Building an internal risk engine?** The Sift Score API adds critical external context to internally-built risk models. Detect global & industry threats with real-time risk scores powered by 1T annual consortium events. Build the way you want, without sacrificing access to the powerful tools in the Sift Console. **Learn more**.

## Stay One Step Ahead of Content Fraud

Quickly identify fraudulent users and investigate their content by combining AI-fueled insight into customer behavior with guided content analysis.

## Automate Fraud Detection and Prioritize Cases

Reduce manual reviews with ML-driven dynamic decisioning. Accelerate review rates with guided investigations and embedded case management.

## It Takes a Network to Fight a Network

Advancements in AI are accelerating the rate and complexity of how fraudsters are facilitating content abuse. To meet this head on, Sift equips businesses with a network of AI-based fraud prevention. With over 1 trillion digital events analyzed each year, businesses can quickly spot and prevent international fraud rings from infiltrating their communities.

1T

Events per year

Stop fraudsters before they hit your site with insights from Sift’s expansive global network.

16k

Unique model attributes

Leverage models that include a comprehensive range of customer behavior signals.

90%

Reduction in spam & scams

Lean on proven benchmarks that embed trust into your brand experience.
